query: Decompose this work: add a rate limiter library, wire AuthService into it, and update the auth docs.
expected_behavior: Picks a decomposition pattern (pipeline, since auth-integration depends on ratelimit-lib output)
Drafts at least 3 tasks with disjoint non-read-only target_files
Chooses fork for tightly-coupled work (auth-integration with AuthService context) and named for self-contained work (library, docs)
Sets worktree: true for tasks that may edit overlapping areas in parallel or need distinct base refs; skip worktree for docs-only work
Includes a validation_command on every task
Adds a dependencies edge from auth-integration to ratelimit-lib
Emits a manifest validated against templates/task-manifest.schema.json
Prints a one-screen summary table and does not spawn anything
